title: Fourth Outer Rim Army
content:
{{Top|canon=4th Sector Army}} {{Fleet |image=[[File:Battle_of_Mygeeto.jpg]] |name=Fourth Outer Rim Army
White Cuirass Command |type= |founder= |founded=c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |headquarter=[[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] |location=*[[Sector 4]] *[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] |commander=[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Praji (Moff)|Praji]] |officers=*[[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] *[[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Clone Marshal Commander]] [[Bacara/Legends|Bacara]] |crew= |flagship= |capital= |starfighters= |ground= |naval= |campaigns= |battles= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} The '''Fourth Outer Rim Army''', also known as the '''4th Sector Army''', '''White Cuirass Command''', and simply the '''Fourth Army''', was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and later [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sector Army/Legends|Sector Army]] charged with the defense of [[Sector 4]]. Initially assigned to Sector 4 as part of the [[Sector Army/Legends|Reserve Sector Armies]], the 4th Sector Army served as a reserve command for Republic campaigns in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Late in the war, it became known as the '''Outer Rim Sector Army''' while serving alongside the [[Thirteenth Army]] in the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. It contained [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] and [[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|clone marshal commander]] [[Bacara/Legends|CC-1138's]] [[Galactic Marines/Legends|21st Nova Corps]]. The 4th Sector Army eventually saw action within their own theater late into the Clone Wars, when it participated in the [[Battle on Neimoidia/Legends|battle of Neimoidia]]. {{Military-stub}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *{{FactFile2014|97|BAC 1-2|Clone Commander Bacara}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{SectorArmiesNav}} {{Interlang |de=4. Sektor-Armee |es=Cuarto Ejército del Borde Exterior |pl=4 Armia Sektorowa |tr=Dördüncü Dış Halka Ordusu }} [[Category:Sector Armies|4]]
